title: Learning Graph Viewer
description: Interactive vis-network visualization for learning graph viewer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
vis-network
learningObjectives: Locate specific concepts in a learning graph using type-ahead search that respects the active taxonomy filters
Filter graph categories on and off using the color-coded legend checkboxes and the Check All and Uncheck All buttons
Interpret the real-time node, edge, and orphan statistics as taxonomy categories are toggled
Identify orphaned concepts with no connections as evidence that a learning graph needs editing
Design a progressive study sequence by enabling foundation categories first and gradually revealing advanced topics
